The '''Induparan Crown Worlds''' were a group of star systems within [[Ado sector/Legends|Ado sector]], that included the [[Ec Pand system/Legends|Ec Pand system]] and [[Indupar/Legends|Indupar]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Induparan Monarchy]] held both the right to ownership of the worlds as well as the right to rule over them.
